# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a single-page React application built with modern frontend technologies. It follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns:

- **Frontend Layer**: React components with TypeScript for type safety
- **State Management**: React hooks and context for local state, Supabase for server state
- **Data Layer**: Supabase client for database operations and real-time subscriptions
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens and component library

## Key Architectural Decisions

### Component Organization
- Components are organized by feature/domain (attendance, leave, payroll, etc.)
- Shared UI components are in `src/components/ui/`
- Layout components handle navigation and responsive design
- Each major feature has its own subdirectory with related components

### Routing Strategy
- Uses React Router for client-side routing
- Page components are in `src/pages/` directory
- Navigation is handled through a sidebar layout component

### Data Management
- Supabase provides database, authentication, and file storage
- Edge functions handle complex business logic (attendance parsing, payroll generation)
- Real-time subscriptions for live updates (notifications, etc.)

### Styling Approach
- Tailwind CSS for utility-first styling
- Custom CSS variables for design tokens (--ff-display, --ff-body, etc.)
- Consistent color palette and typography system
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders the root App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main application component with routing setup
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main dashboard/home page

### Layout Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout wrapper with sidebar and header
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar with menu items
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar with user menu and notifications
- `src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx`: Notification dropdown component

### Feature Components
- `src/components/attendance/AttendanceUploadFlow.tsx`: Complex upload flow for attendance data with AI parsing
- `src/components/employee-profile/AttendanceTab.tsx`: Employee attendance history display
- `src/components/leave/ApplyLeaveModal.tsx`: Leave request form modal
- `src/components/payroll/PayrollSummary.tsx`: Payroll data visualization
- `src/components/settings/CompanyTab.tsx`: Company information management

### Utility and Configuration
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for className merging)
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts`: Activity logging and categorization logic
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based access control utilities
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management hook

### UI Component Library
- `src/components/ui/`: Reusable UI components (Button, Input, Table, etc.)
- Built on top of Radix UI primitives with Tailwind styling
- Consistent design system across the application

## Database Schema Highlights

The application uses PostgreSQL via Supabase with the following key tables:

- `employees`: Employee profiles and authentication links
- `attendance_records`: Time tracking data with check-in/out times
- `leave_requests`: Leave applications and approvals
- `payroll_records`: Salary and overtime calculations
- `company_settings`: Organization-wide configuration
- `departments`: Department structure
- `roles`: User roles and permissions

## Business Logic Patterns

### Attendance Processing
- Raw attendance data uploaded via Excel files
- AI-powered parsing (Supabase Edge Function) to normalize data
- Calculation of working hours, overtime, and late arrivals
- Support for holidays and weekends

### Leave Management
- Balance tracking with different leave types
- Approval workflows with role-based permissions
- Integration with attendance for leave calculations

### Payroll Generation
- Automated payroll calculation based on attendance and salary structures
- Overtime and holiday pay calculations
- PDF generation for payslips

### Security and Access Control
- Role-based permissions (admin, manager, employee)
- Mandatory password changes for new users
- Secure file uploads and storage

## Development Workflow

- **Build Tool**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit testing with React Testing Library
- **Linting**: ESLint configuration for code quality
- **Type Checking**: TypeScript for compile-time type safety
- **Version Control**: Git with conventional commit messages

## Performance Considerations

- Lazy loading of components and routes
- Optimized bundle splitting with Vite
- Efficient data fetching with Supabase RLS policies
- Real-time updates only where necessary
- Responsive images and asset optimization

## Deployment

- Built for static hosting (Vercel, Netlify, etc.)
- Environment-based configuration
- CDN for static assets
- Supabase handles backend scaling automatically
